<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Traits; use Predis\Command\Command; use UnexpectedValueException; /** * @mixin Command */ trait MinMaxModifier { /** * @var array{string: string} */ private $modifierEnum = [ 'min' => 'MIN', 'max' => 'MAX', ]; public function resolveModifier(int $offset, array &$arguments): void { if ($offset >= count($arguments)) { $arguments[$offset] = $this->modifierEnum['min']; return; } if (!is_string($arguments[$offset]) || !array_key_exists($arguments[$offset], $this->modifierEnum)) { throw new UnexpectedValueException('Wrong type of modifier given'); } $arguments[$offset] = $this->modifierEnum[$arguments[$offset]]; } }
